description.en: Details of fees and pricing structures

description.en: Details the technical requirements for the bicycle garages and booking platform.
Overall system description and scope of supply for bicycle garages.
The document includes a subsection specifically for bicycle garages under the Marienkirchplatz section.
description.original: 01.01 Fahrradgaragen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fahrradgaragen im Baukastensystem mit Kiesdach liefern und montieren

description.en: Supply and install a modular bicycle garage system with a gravel roof for 3 separately lockable single garages.
description.original: Fahrradgaragen im Baukastensystem mit Kiesdach liefern und montieren

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Each system consists of 3 lockable garages

description.en: Each of the 2 bicycle garage systems must consist of 3 lockable bicycle garages.
description.original: jeweils 3 abschließbaren Fahrradgaragen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Garage für 3 separat abschließbare Einzelgaragen nach DIN 79008

description.en: Garage for 3 separately lockable single garages according to DIN 79008, ADFC-certified system.
description.original: für 3 separat abschließbare Einzelgaragen nach DIN 79008, ADFC-zertifiziertes System

description.en: Physical dimensions and structural load requirements.
Dimensions: length 2.50m, depth 2.00m, height approx. 1.65m.
description.original: Abmessungen: Länge 2,50m, Tiefe 2,00m, Höhe ca. 1,65m

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Clear door opening minimum width 0.70 m and height 1.45 m

description.en: The clear door opening must be at least 0.70 m wide and 1.45 m high.
description.original: lichte Türöffnungen: mind. Breite 0,70m x Höhe 1,45m

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wind load zone up to zone 3

description.en: The structure must be designed for wind load zone up to zone 3.
description.original: Bemessungsgrundlagen Windlastzone bis Zone 3

description.en: The structure must be designed for a snow load of approximately 1.1 kN/m².
description.original: Schneelast ca. 1,1kN/m²

description.en: The structure must be designed for a maintenance load of approximately 1.1 kN/m².
description.original: Wartungslast ca. 1,1 kN/m²

description.en: Specifications for structural materials, corrosion protection, and coatings.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tragkonstruktion aus verzinktem, gekantetem Stahlblech, Materialstärke 2mm

description.en: Support structure made of galvanized, folded steel sheet, material thickness 2mm, statically designed according to relevant standards.
description.original: Tragkonstruktion aus verzinktem, gekantetem Stahlblech, statisch bemessen nach den einschlägigen Normen, Materialstärke 2mm

description.en: All ground-contact parts made of stainless steel.
description.original: alle erdberührendene Teile aus Edelstahl

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Korrosionsschutz in Anlehnung an C3 nach DIN EN ISO 12944-2

description.en: Corrosion protection according to C3 class per DIN EN ISO 12944-2.
description.original: mit Korrosionsschutz in Anlehung an C3 nach DIN EN ISO 12944-2

description.en: Anti-graffiti coating with PU powder, DB certification, color RAL 7016 anthracite grey.
description.original: Antigraffitischutz Beschichtung mit Antigraffiti-Pulver PU, DB-Zertifizierung, Farbe RAL 7016 anthrazitgrau

description.en: Requirements for the gravel roof and its layers.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Bicycle garages must have a gravel roof

description.en: The bicycle boxes must be equipped with a gravel roof.
description.original: Die Fahrradboxen erhalten ein Kiesdach

description.en: Gravel roof made of sustainable timber construction.
description.original: Kiesdach Dach aus nachhaltiger Holzkonstruktion

description.en: Roof build-up from inside to outside: OSB-3 board approx. 15mm, EPDM membrane approx. 1.5mm, root barrier fleece, round gravel 16/32mm approx. 50mm.
description.original: Aufbau von innen nach außen bestehend aus - OSB-3-Platte, Dicke ca. 15mm - EPDM-Dachbahn, Dicke ca. 1,5mm - Wurzelschutzvlies - Rundkies, Körnung 16/32mm, Höhe ca. 50mm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Dachrand aus Glattblech mit Korrosionsschutz C3, pulverbeschichtet analog Fassade

description.en: Roof edge made of smooth sheet metal with corrosion protection C3, powder-coated same as facade.
description.original: mit Dachrand aus Glattblech mit Korrosionsschutz C3, pulverbeschichtet analog Fassadenbekleidung

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Entwässerung über Haupt- und Notablauf DN50 aus Kunststoff, Fallrohr innenliegend

description.en: Drainage via main and emergency drain DN50 made of plastic, downpipe internal, water outlet centered below the support frame.
description.original: Entwässerung über Haupt- und Notablauf DN50 aus Kunststoff, Fallrohr innenliegend, Wasseraustritt mittig und unterhalb des Tragkorpus

description.en: Specifications for doors, handles, and dampers.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Single-leaf steel door per individual garage

description.en: Each individual garage must have a single-leaf steel door made from folded galvanized steel sheet, powder-coated to match the facade cladding.
description.original: Einflüglige Stahltür je Einzelgarage aus gekantetem verzinktem Stahlblech, pulverbeschichtet analog Fassadenbekleidung

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Aluminum handle set with inside lever for emergency opening

description.en: The door must be equipped with an aluminum handle set featuring an inside lever for emergency opening.
description.original: Ausstattung mit Aluminium-Drückergarnitur mit innenseitiger Klinke als Notfallöffnung

description.en: The door must include a door damper.
description.original: Türdämpfer

description.en: Requirements for facade cladding and color.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fassadenbekleidung aus Stahlblech, pulverbeschichtet, Farbe RAL 7016 anthrazitgrau

description.en: Facade cladding made of steel sheet, powder-coated with universal polyester powder, color RAL 7016 anthracite grey.
description.original: Fassadenbekleidung aus Stahlblech, Oberfläche pulverbeschichtet mit Universal-Polyesterpulver, Farbe RAL 7016 anthrazitgrau

description.en: Additional components like bicycle racks, lighting, and their installation.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fahrradhalter mit Einfahrtschiene liefern und montieren

description.en: Supply and install bicycle holders with entry rails made of stainless steel for comfortable wheel guidance, suitable for tire widths from 25 to 65 mm, with front wheel holder to lock the wheel and prevent rolling out. The bicycle holder must be of brand BRIX-IT or equivalent; the bidder must enter the chosen brand.
description.original: Fahrradhalter mit Einfahrtschiene aus Edelstahl zur komfortablen Führung der Räder liefern und montieren, für Reifenbreite von 25 bis 65mm, Vorderradhalter zur Arretierung des Rades und Verhinderung des Herausrollens.

description.en: Supply and install a swiveling LED light strip, battery-operated, with integrated motion sensor and energy-saving timer.
description.original: schwenkbare LED-Lichtleiste liefern und montieren, batteriebetrieben, mit integriertem Bewegungsensor und energiesparender Zeitschaltung

description.en: Software, locking systems, and user interface for booking and access.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Digital battery-operated locking cylinder with booking platform connection and smartphone app control

description.en: The door must have a digital, battery-operated locking cylinder that connects to a booking platform. The system must be supplied, installed, and set up to be used exclusively via a smartphone app (iOS/Android) without a stationary terminal on site.
description.original: digitalen, batteriebetriebenen Schließzylinder mit Anschluss an eine Buchungsplattform

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Digitale Buchungsplattform liefern, installieren und einrichten

description.en: Supply, install and set up a digital cloud-based booking platform, exclusively usable via smartphone app (iOS/Android) with multi-level AI-based and telephone customer service.
description.original: Digitale, cloudbasierte Buchungsplattform liefern, installieren und einrichten ausschlielich nutzbar per Smartphone-App (iOS / Android) und mehrstufigen KI-basierten und telefonischen Kundensu

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Own QR code and booking instructions

description.en: The system must have its own QR code and booking instructions.
description.original: Mit eigenem QR-Code und Buchungsanleitung

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Interactive map for site search and selection

description.en: The system must provide an interactive map view for searching and selecting bicycle parking facilities via link or QR code.
description.original: interaktive Kartenansicht, Auswahl der Abstellanlagen per Link oder QR-Code

description.en: The system must open power-grid-independent, Bluetooth-based locking systems that are independent of the power grid.
description.original: Öffnen von stromnetzunabhängiger, Bluetooth-basierter, stromnetzumabhängiger Schließsysteme

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: App functions for booking and access

description.en: The app must include functions for booking and access (implied from context).
description.original: Funktionen für App:

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Time-tiered price overview and flexible tariff systems

description.en: The system must offer a time-tiered price overview and flexible tariff systems such as pay-as-you-go, monthly and annual rentals.
description.original: zeitlich gestaffelte Preisübersicht, flexible Tarifsysteme (z. B. Pay-as-you-go, Monats- und Jahresmieten)

description.en: The system must support various payment methods including credit card, Klarna, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
description.original: verschiedene Zahlungsmethoden (z. B. Kreditkarte, Klarna, Apple Pay, Google Pay)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Automatic invoicing and booking confirmation via email

description.en: The system must provide automatic invoicing and send booking confirmation via email.
description.original: automatische Rechnungsstellung und Buchungsbestätigung per E-Mail

description.en: The system must send reminders before the booking period expires and provide information on ongoing or completed bookings.
description.original: Erinnerung vor Ablauf des Buchungszeitraums, Informationen zu laufenden oder beendeten Buchungen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: User account with registration, login, and history

description.en: The system must include user account features: registration, login, personal data changes, booking history, and cancellation functions.
description.original: Registrierung, Login, Änderung persönlicher Daten, Buchungshistorie, Stornofunktionen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Central management of all facilities and locations

description.en: The operator web portal must allow central management of all parking facilities and locations, including detailed device configuration (technical parameters, capacities, safety functions).
description.original: Standort- und Anlagenverwaltung: zentrale Verwaltung aller Abstellanlagen und Standorte und detaillierte Konfiguration der Geräte (z. B. technische Parameter, Kapazitäten, Sicherheitsfunktionen)

description.en: The operator web portal must allow individual setting of tariff systems, rental durations, tiered prices, and adjustment of booking conditions and reservation options.
description.original: Tarif- und Buchungsmanagement: individuelle Einstellung von Tarifsystemen, Mietdauern und gestaffelten Preisen und Anpassung von Buchungsbedingungen und Reservierungsoptionen

description.en: The booking platform must allow individual adjustment of tariff systems, rental durations, tiered pricing, as well as adjustment of booking conditions and reservation options.
description.original: individuelle Einstellung von Tarifsystemen, Mietdauern und gestaffelten Preisen

description.en: The platform must include user management, rights and access permissions, integration of Single Sign-On (SSO) for external identity providers, GDPR-compliant data storage, and regular security updates.
description.original: Verwaltung der Nutzer, Rechte und Zugangsberechtigungen, Integration von Single Sign-On (SSO) für externe Identitätsprovider, DSGVO-konforme Datenhaltung und regelmäßige Updates der Sicherheitsstandards

description.en: The platform must provide real-time status display of all devices, statistical evaluation of occupancy rates, management of refunds, and detailed billing.
description.original: Echtzeit-Statusanzeige aller Geräte und statistische Auswertung der Belegungsraten, Verwaltung von Rückerstattungen und detaillierten Abrechnungen

description.en: Covers delivery, installation, and setup of the bicycle garages and booking platform.
Covers the delivery and initial setup of the bicycle garage systems.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Delivery and installation of 2 bicycle garage systems

description.en: The tender covers the delivery and installation of 2 bicycle garage systems, each consisting of 3 lockable bicycle garages.
description.original: Lieferung und Aufstellung von 2 Stück Fahrradgaragensystemen besteht aus jeweils 3 abschließbaren Fahrradgaragen.

description.en: Requirements for installing the system on existing surfaces without ground anchoring.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Install directly on existing water-bound path surface

description.en: The bicycle garages must be placed directly onto the existing water-bound path surface without additional foundation.
description.original: direkt auf die vorhandene wassergebundene Wegedecke aufzustellen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Installation without ground anchoring on existing water-bound path surface

description.en: The garage must be installed without ground anchoring on the existing water-bound path surface, using leveling feet to compensate for slopes up to approximately 2%.
description.original: Aufstellen ohne Bodenverankerung auf vorhandener wassergebundener Wegedecke gemäß Herstellerangaben mit Nivellierfüßen zum Ausgleich von Gefälle bis ca. 2%.

description.en: Setting up the portal including consultation for master data.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Set up portal including operator consultation for master data

description.en: The portal must be set up including consultation of the operator for providing master data and setting up the location on the operator's server.
description.original: Einrichtung des Portals inkl. Beratung des Betreibers zur Bereitstellung der Stammdaten, Einrichtung des Standortes auf dem Server des Betreibers

description.en: Refers to the booking platform as a software component.
Requirements related to the booking platform functionality.
The document includes a section and a subsection for the booking platform and its details.
description.original: 02 Buchungsplattform

description.en: Includes ongoing support and maintenance services.
Requirements for customer support services including AI-based and telephone support.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Multi-level AI-based and telephone customer support

description.en: The system must include multi-level AI-based and telephone customer support, with automated AI-based first-level support available 24/7 in 14 languages and a second-level support hotline.
description.original: mehrstufigen KI-basierten und telefonischen Kundensupport

description.en: Addresses data protection and security requirements.
Requirements for GDPR compliance and data encryption.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: GDPR-compliant server and encrypted data transmission

description.en: The system must provide GDPR-compliant server deployment and encrypted data transmission.
description.original: DSGVO-konforme Serverbereitstellung, verschlüsselte Datenübertragung
